sidebar.noHeadings: No headings yet. Add a heading to build the outline.
sidebar.noDocument: Open or create a document to see its outline.

help.hint: Open or drop a .md file, switch Preview/Editor from the top tabs, and use the outline to jump between headings.

welcome.title: Markdown Viewer
welcome.subtitle: Open a Markdown file to read it cleanly.
welcome.dropHint: or drop a .md file anywhere in this window

dialog.unsavedBody: This document has unsaved changes. Save them before continuing?

exportDialog.title: Export Document
exportDialog.pdfDescription: Ideal for printing and sharing exact layouts.
exportDialog.htmlDescription: Best for web publishing and embedding.
exportDialog.pngDescription: High-resolution image of the document content.

notice.unsupported: Unsupported file type. Only .md and .markdown files can be opened.
